fields.label: Network Name
fields.description: e.g., Facebook, Instagram, Twitter/X, LinkedIn, Google Ads, TikTok

fields.label: Network Code
fields.description: Unique identifier (e.g., fb, ig, twitter, linkedin, google)

fields.label: Network Type
fields.options:
Social Media
Advertising Platform
Messaging
Search Engine
Out of Home (OOH)
Email
SMS
Other

fields.label: API Base URL
fields.description: Base URL for API calls

fields.label: Authentication Type
fields.options:
OAuth 2.0
API Key
Bearer Token
Basic Auth
Custom
fields.description: How to authenticate with the API

fields.label: Connected App
fields.description: Frappe Connected App that handles OAuth for this platform

fields.label: Publish Endpoint
fields.description: API endpoint for publishing. Use {account_id} for placeholders

fields.label: Delete Endpoint
fields.description: API endpoint for deletion. Use {post_id} for placeholders

fields.label: Analytics Endpoint
fields.description: API endpoint for fetching analytics. Use {post_id} for placeholders

fields.label: Content Field Name
fields.description: JSON field name for post content (e.g., 'text', 'message', 'caption')

fields.label: Media Field Name
fields.description: JSON field name for media URL (e.g., 'image_url', 'media', 'file_url')

fields.label: Response ID Field
fields.description: JSON path to post ID in response (e.g., 'id', 'data.id')

fields.label: Post URL Template
fields.description: Template for post URL. Use {post_id} placeholder

fields.label: Custom Adapter Class
fields.description: Python class path for custom adapter (e.g., 'marketing_hub.utils.social_adapters.meta.MetaAdapter'). Leave blank to use generic adapter.

fields.label: Post Types
fields.description: Supported post types (one per line): Text, Image, Video, Carousel, Story, Reel, etc.

fields.label: Max Text Length
fields.description: Maximum character limit for posts

fields.label: Supports HTML
fields.description: Whether this network accepts HTML formatting in post content

fields.label: Max Hashtags
fields.description: Maximum number of hashtags allowed per post

fields.label: Max Mentions
fields.description: Maximum number of @mentions allowed per post

fields.label: Max Media Count
fields.description: Maximum number of media files per post

fields.label: Max Images
fields.description: Maximum number of images per post

fields.label: Max Videos
fields.description: Maximum number of videos per post

fields.label: Supported File Formats
fields.description: Supported media formats (e.g., jpg, png, mp4)

fields.label: Image Specifications
fields.description: JSON object with image size specs (e.g., {"Feed": "1200x628", "Square": "1080x1080"})

fields.label: Video Specifications
fields.description: JSON object with video specs (e.g., {"format": ["MP4", "MOV"], "duration": "1-241 seconds"})

fields.label: Text Limits
fields.description: JSON object with character limits (e.g., {"primary_text": 125, "headline": 40})

fields.label: Best Practices
fields.description: Best practices for this platform (one per line)
